rationale.edition: All changed file paths live under web/src/ and tests/ui-testing/ — both OSS-owned directories. No enterprise paths (enterprise/, o2_enterprise/) are touched. No enterprise keywords (cipher, SSO, SAML, RBAC, SDR) appear in the changed paths. The feature is an OSS logs-table rendering enhancement.
rationale.skip: No skip markers found (trigger_comment.txt and feature_hint.txt are both empty; no tests-added label). The change is not docs-only or CI-only — it modifies multiple user-facing Vue components (SearchResult.vue, TenstackTable.vue, Index.vue, etc.) and adds a new composable export (resolveDefaultColumns) that alters what columns the logs table renders by default. The FTS default-column feature is a visible behavioral change for all logs users.
rationale.e2e: E2E is warranted because the FTS default-column feature changes what users see in the logs results table: the system now automatically selects and displays a best-fill full-text column (e.g. body/message/log) instead of always showing the generic source column. This affects the default view, the severity color bar, detail-dialog row click targets, stream switching, saved-view column persistence, SQL mode column rendering, and field pinning/removal behavior — all user-exercisable flows that need browser-level verification.
rationale.area: All UI changes are concentrated in web/src/plugins/logs/ and web/src/composables/useLogs.ts. The existing sibling specs live in tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/Logs/ (logstable.spec.js is the closest sibling, modified in this same diff). The Playwright workflow maps all Logs-Core/Logs-Features/Logs-Builder-* logical folders to the actual Logs directory.
rationale.group: Logs-Core is the best fit — it already contains logstable.spec.js (table rendering) and logspage.spec.js (general logs page), both directly related to the default-column table behavior this feature changes. The feature is fundamental to the logs table rendering path, not a niche builder or feature-specific add-on.
rationale.existing_tests: Three Playwright E2E specs are modified in the diff: indexquery.spec.js, logsquickmode.spec.js, and logstable.spec.js. However, their changes are compatibility updates — removing assertions on now-absent columns, switching to mode-agnostic helpers — not dedicated tests exercising the new FTS default-column selection logic (fill-rate priority, user-pin override, system-pick non-persistence, stream-switch clearing, SQL-mode bypass). The Architect should generate a new spec for the feature rather than relying solely on these compatibility edits. No new E2E spec for the feature itself exists in the diff.
